description: Component for polling a RabbitMQ queue for new messages.

host.label: Host
host.description: RabbitMQ broker hostname or IP address

queue_name.label: Queue Name
queue_name.description: Name of the RabbitMQ queue to monitor

job_name.label: Job Name
job_name.description: Name of the job to trigger when messages are received

username_env_var.label: Username Env Var
username_env_var.description: Name of the environment variable containing the RabbitMQ username

password_env_var.label: Password Env Var
password_env_var.description: Name of the environment variable containing the RabbitMQ password

use_tls.label: Use Tls
use_tls.description: Whether to use TLS for the connection

max_messages_per_poll.label: Max Messages Per Poll
max_messages_per_poll.description: Maximum number of messages to consume per evaluation

resource_key.label: Resource Key
resource_key.description: Optional Dagster resource key providing a pre-configured client.
